items.title: If you're building hypothetical Mo Diawara contracts, a 4-year deal using his non-Bird rights (starting at ~$2.6M) could be worth $11.2M total. Only other way to get above $10M total would be to sign him for two years via the non-taxpayer MLE and stay below the second apron.
items.author: Fred Katz
items.body_excerpt: If you're building hypothetical Mo Diawara contracts, a 4-year deal using his non-Bird rights (starting at ~$2.6M) could be worth $11.2M total. Only other way to get above $10M total would be to sign him for two years via the non-taxpayer MLE and stay below the second apron.

items.title: New York Knicks updated salary cap situation.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
New York Knicks updated salary cap situation.

They can give Mohamed Diawara up to four years, $11.3 million with his Non Bird rights. His minimum over four years is $10.6 million.

They are still free to go above the second apron by re-signing their own free agents.
